name: @gitgecko/repo-import
description: gitgecko repo-import owner — clone/mirror repos, maintain HEAD freshness (02 §2). RepoImportSocket { import, sync }. Multi-VCS (github/gitlab/bitbucket/azure/local). Salvages pr-agent _GIT_PROVIDERS pattern (P-plugin-5). Unblocks the end-to-end indexing pipeline.
